title: Display attachments in tk view (TUI)
description: Show attachments in the tk tui detail pane. Update internal/tui/view_detail.go (the editable detail view-model from the 0.18 tk tui rewrite) to render an Attachments section in the metadata block. NOTE: supersedes the original plan, which referenced tk view and internal/tui/model.go/buildDetailContent -- both removed in the tk tui rewrite. Depends on the attachments data model (epic 7ab) landing first.
